websiteRankTracker.title: Website Rank Tracker
websiteRankTracker.subtitle: Track and compare website rankings over time using Tranco data. Compare up to 2 domains side by side.
websiteRankTracker.errorNoData: No valid ranking data found for any of the provided domains. Please check the domain names and try again.
websiteRankTracker.errorFetch: An error occurred while fetching data
websiteRankTracker.domainInputDescription: Enter website domains to compare (e.g., example.com or https://www.example.com). You can compare up to 2 domains.
websiteRankTracker.chartDescription: Website rankings over time (lower numbers are better)
